rationale: Both correctly diagnose PR #4527's (None, payload) regression and correctly identify PR #4792 as the fix already folded into the vLLM 0.24 rebase, matching the ground truth thread. Y quotes the ground-truth code comment almost verbatim and more accurately captures akshatvishu's 'for some reason' ambiguity by noting #4792 was closed as conflicting rather than cleanly merged, whereas X flatly asserts the PR 'is merged' and introduces an unverified extraneous claim (issue #4962) not present in the thread. X compensates with broader reporter-specific troubleshooting notes, giving it a slight completeness boost, but this doesn't offset the grounding/correctness edge Y holds.
